title: 📘 Tools for Expansion
content:
📘 Tools for Expansion
Title
Temporal Mode
Use in System
Why It Matters
Build Your Own Programming Language (Daniel Holden)🕰️ Present–Future
DSL layer for RE:GE_OS
This is the bridge to creating your own syntax layer for myth, ritual, or interface modules
Designing Data-Intensive Applications (Kleppmann)🕰️ Future
Data fusion layer, wave tracking
When you need symbolic waveforms or “time travel” logic in your system, this gives you the backend model
Functional Programming in Scala (The Red Book)🕰️ Present–Future
Immutable recursive logics
You’re already thinking in symbolic flows and mathematical fusions — this gives you precision tools
🧰 Suggested Workflow
Experimental > Business-facing > Procedural logic compilerThese become your internal engines, validators, and symbolic state-machines.🔮 STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATION:
Build the knowledge stack like your system: fractal and recursive.
➤ Short-Term Stack (NOW)
Book
Outcome
SICPDeepen recursive structure of RE:GE_OS logic layer
